Dosha Guide

Kaal Sarp Dosh (Kaal Sarp Yoga)

Complete guide to understanding Kaal Sarp Dosh, its 12 types, effects on different aspects of life, and powerful remedies to overcome this dosha.

What is Kaal Sarp Dosh?

Kaal Sarp Dosh is formed when all seven planets (Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) are hemmed between Rahu and Ketu in a birth chart. This creates a serpent-like formation where Rahu is the head and Ketu is the tail, with all planets trapped within.

The word "Kaal" means time or death, and "Sarp" means serpent. This yoga is believed to bring karmic challenges from past lives that need to be resolved in the current lifetime.

There are 12 types of Kaal Sarp Dosh, each named after a mythological serpent, depending on which house Rahu occupies. The effects vary based on the type and the overall strength of the birth chart.

General Effects of Kaal Sarp Dosh
Delays and obstacles in major life events
Sudden ups and downs in career and finances
Health issues, especially related to nervous system
Relationship and marriage difficulties
Mental stress, anxiety, and fear
Obstacles in education and career growth
Property and legal disputes
Lack of peace and satisfaction despite efforts

12 Types of Kaal Sarp Dosh

Anant Kaal Sarp Dosh
High
Rahu: 1st House | Ketu: 7th House

Affects health, personality, and marriage. May cause delays in marriage and partnership issues.

Kulik Kaal Sarp Dosh
High
Rahu: 2nd House | Ketu: 8th House

Impacts wealth, family, and longevity. Financial instability and family disputes possible.

Vasuki Kaal Sarp Dosh
Medium
Rahu: 3rd House | Ketu: 9th House

Affects courage, siblings, and fortune. May cause issues with siblings and luck.

Shankhpal Kaal Sarp Dosh
High
Rahu: 4th House | Ketu: 10th House

Impacts home, mother, and career. Property issues and career obstacles possible.

Padma Kaal Sarp Dosh
Medium
Rahu: 5th House | Ketu: 11th House

Affects children, education, and gains. May cause delays in childbirth and income issues.

Mahapadma Kaal Sarp Dosh
Medium
Rahu: 6th House | Ketu: 12th House

Impacts enemies, health, and expenses. Legal issues and health problems possible.

Takshak Kaal Sarp Dosh
High
Rahu: 7th House | Ketu: 1st House

Affects marriage, partnerships, and self. Relationship troubles and identity issues.

Karkotak Kaal Sarp Dosh
High
Rahu: 8th House | Ketu: 2nd House

Impacts longevity, secrets, and family. Sudden events and family wealth issues.

Shankhachud Kaal Sarp Dosh
Medium
Rahu: 9th House | Ketu: 3rd House

Affects fortune, father, and courage. Luck fluctuations and sibling issues.

Ghatak Kaal Sarp Dosh
High
Rahu: 10th House | Ketu: 4th House

Impacts career, reputation, and home. Professional setbacks and domestic unrest.

Vishdhar Kaal Sarp Dosh
Medium
Rahu: 11th House | Ketu: 5th House

Affects gains, friends, and children. Income fluctuations and children-related concerns.

Sheshnag Kaal Sarp Dosh
Medium
Rahu: 12th House | Ketu: 6th House

Impacts expenses, spirituality, and enemies. Foreign connections and hidden enemies.

Remedies for Kaal Sarp Dosh

Puja & Rituals
  • Perform Kaal Sarp Dosh Nivaran Puja at Trimbakeshwar
  • Conduct Rahu-Ketu Shanti Puja
  • Perform Naag Panchami Puja with devotion
  • Visit Kaal Sarp temples like Mahakaleshwar, Ujjain
  • Perform Rudrabhishek on Mondays
  • Conduct Sarpa Suktam Parayanam
Mantras & Chanting
  • Chant Rahu Mantra: 'Om Bhram Bhreem Bhroum Sah Rahave Namaha' 18,000 times
  • Chant Ketu Mantra: 'Om Stram Streem Straum Sah Ketave Namaha' 17,000 times
  • Recite Maha Mrityunjaya Mantra 108 times daily
  • Chant Naag Gayatri Mantra on Naag Panchami
  • Recite Vishnu Sahasranama on Saturdays
Donations & Charity
  • Donate black and white sesame seeds on Saturdays
  • Feed snakes milk on Naag Panchami (symbolically at temples)
  • Donate blankets to the needy
  • Offer coconut and flowers at snake temples
  • Donate iron items on Saturdays
Gemstones & Lifestyle
  • Wear Gomed (Hessonite) for Rahu after consultation
  • Wear Cat's Eye (Lehsunia) for Ketu after consultation
  • Keep a silver snake idol at home and worship
  • Avoid harming snakes or any reptiles
  • Practice meditation and spiritual activities
  • Fast on Naag Panchami
Important Temples for Kaal Sarp Dosh
Visit these temples for Kaal Sarp Dosh Nivaran Puja

Trimbakeshwar, Nashik

Most famous for Kaal Sarp Puja

Mahakaleshwar, Ujjain

One of 12 Jyotirlingas

Kalahasti, Andhra Pradesh

Famous for Rahu-Ketu Puja

Rameswaram, Tamil Nadu

For Naag Dosha Nivaran

Kukke Subramanya, Karnataka

Famous Naag temple

Thirunageswaram, Tamil Nadu

Rahu temple

Understanding Kaal Sarp Dosh in Context

While Kaal Sarp Dosh is considered significant in Vedic astrology, it's important to understand that its effects are modified by many factors. The strength of individual planets, beneficial aspects, and the overall chart configuration all play a role.

Many successful people have Kaal Sarp Yoga in their charts. The yoga can also bring intense focus, determination, and the ability to overcome obstacles. It often indicates a soul that has chosen challenging lessons for spiritual growth.

Rather than fearing this yoga, approach it as an opportunity for transformation. The remedies help balance the energies and reduce challenging effects while enhancing the positive potential of this powerful configuration.
